description_long: This object is a large, blocky knife or sword with a distinctly modern and geometric design. The blade is wide and rectangular, with a flat, unsharpened tip and a deep, central cutout or recess visible from the front and back. The handle is integrated into the body, appearing as a thick, angular extension of the blade, and features a rectangular opening that may serve as a grip. The overall form is monolithic, with sharp edges and a matte black finish, giving it a futuristic or industrial appearance. There are no visible decorative elements or traditional features such as a crossguard or pommel. The object appears to be constructed from a solid, heavy material, likely metal, and is designed for robust utility rather than elegance.
description: A large, blocky, matte black knife or sword with a geometric, monolithic design and a rectangular grip opening. The object has a modern, industrial appearance with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: The front view shows the wide, flat blade with a deep central recess and the rectangular grip opening below.
description_view_1: The right-side view highlights the thickness of the blade and handle, as well as the depth of the central cutout.
description_view_2: The back view mirrors the front, showing the same central recess and grip opening, emphasizing the object's symmetry.
description_view_3: The left-side view again displays the object's thickness and the angular, blocky construction of both blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: blocky, integrated, rectangular opening, matte black, no visible ergonomic features
